requirements.evidence: `LSLocationContextBarTest` passed in the focused `:app:testDebugUnitTest` run, and the strengthened unit test now keeps the accessibility/tag-pill composition contract under test.

`LSLocationContextBarUiTest.mode_pill_tap_fires_on_mode_change_once` remains present in `androidTest`, and `:app:compileDebugAndroidTestKotlin` passed. Connected-device execution remains unavailable on this host and is carried as an environment note rather than a code defect.

`LSRouteAttachmentCard.kt` now composes the container through `LSCard`, exposes route-card semantics for padding/scenic state, and the focused unit run plus `LSRouteAttachmentCardUiTest` compilation validated the full route-card contract.
Compact mode still suppresses the best/weather badges, retains the `10dp/12dp` constants, and the focused unit suite passed after the remediation.
The route-stripe resolver still maps `Best`, `Alt1`, and `Alt2` to distinct theme route colors, and the focused unit suite passed with those helpers intact.

`LSRouteAttachmentCardUiTest.on_tap_fires_exactly_once` remains present and `androidTest` sources compile cleanly; execution is environment-limited by the absence of a connected device/emulator on this host.
The story-ID grep across `LSLocationContextBarStory.kt` and `LSRouteAttachmentCardStory.kt` returned `9`, satisfying the `9+` registration gate.

The inline-color grep across the two molecule files returned zero, and host `detekt`, `:app:compileDebugKotlin`, `:app:testDebugUnitTest`, and `:app:compileDebugAndroidTestKotlin` validation all passed.

summary: APPROVED: iteration 002 replaces the route-card surface with `LSCard`, keeps the Android scenic meter aligned with the task-scoped Box-circle design, and adds runtime semantics coverage so composition regressions are caught without depending on brittle source-text assertions alone.
